## KEY FRAMEWORKS

### Tier 1: Signature Systems

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                                                             │
│  RMBC METHOD (Research → Mechanism → Brief → Copy)                          │
│  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════                         │
│  Source: RMBC Method (original course)                                      │
│                                                                             │
│  Stefan's flagship framework. Turns copywriting from an art into an         │
│  engineering discipline. Each phase has specific deliverables.               │
│                                                                             │
│  R — RESEARCH: Deep-dive (5 real-world examples in course)                 │
│  M — MECHANISM: Unique mechanism identification and articulation            │
│  B — BRIEF: Section-by-section blueprint with proof points                 │
│  C — COPY: Execute the brief (writing = filling in template)               │
│                                                                             │
│  "Most copywriters skip R, M, and B — they go straight to C.               │
│  That's why most copy fails. The writing is the easy part."                │
│                                                                             │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                             │
│  15 FUNNEL FACTORS — Funnel Diagnostic Scoring Rubric ★ NEW                │
│  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════                     │
│  Source: RMBC II (2025, Module 15)                                          │
│                                                                             │
│  Comprehensive scoring rubric for diagnosing funnel performance.            │
│  Each factor scored 1-10. Total predicts profitability.                     │
│                                                                             │
│   1. Offer Strength           9. Objection Handling                        │
│   2. Mechanism Clarity       10. CTA Clarity                               │
│   3. Proof Density           11. Urgency/Scarcity                          │
│   4. Lead/Hook Quality       12. Guarantee Strength                        │
│   5. Copy Congruence         13. Price-Value Gap                           │
│   6. Traffic-Copy Fit        14. Upsell Architecture                       │
│   7. Headline Power          15. Email Follow-Up                           │
│   8. Story Engagement                                                      │
│                                                                             │
│  120-150: Elite | 100-119: Strong | 80-99: Average | <80: Fix urgently     │
│  "Fix the weakest factor and you fix the whole funnel."                    │
│                                                                             │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                             │
│  BRIEF 2.0 — The 23-Question Pre-Writing Diagnostic ★ NEW                  │
│  ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════                       │
│  Source: RMBC II (2025, Module 8)                                           │
│                                                                             │
│  Evolved Brief with 23 structured questions across 5 categories:            │
│  • Avatar & Market (Q1-5)                                                   │
│  • Mechanism & Product (Q6-10)                                              │
│  • Proof & Credibility (Q11-14)                                             │
│  • Objections & Fears (Q15-18)                                              │
│  • Offer & Close (Q19-23)                                                   │
│                                                                             │
│  "If you can't answer all 23 questions, you're not ready to write."        │
│                                                                             │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                             │
│  AI-ASSISTED COPYWRITING WORKFLOW ★ NEW                                     │
│  ═════════════════════════════════════                                      │
│  Source: RMBC II (2025, Modules 1-4, 6, 9-10)                              │
│                                                                             │
│  5-phase human-AI collaboration model:                                      │
│  Phase 1: AI Research (LLM-powered market/product/competitor analysis)     │
│  Phase 2: AI Mechanism Brainstorm (50+ candidates → scoring → selection)   │
│  Phase 3: Brief 2.0 (human answers, AI structures)                         │
│  Phase 4: AI Draft → Human Edit (Claude VSL Projects)                      │
│  Phase 5: Funnel Integration (15 Funnel Factors scoring)                   │
│                                                                             │
│  "AI is the first draft machine. You are the editor-in-chief."             │
│                                                                             │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                             │
│  PROFIT FIX FORMULA — 5-Section Funnel Diagnostic ★ NEW                    │
│  ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════                       │
│  Source: Profit Fix Formula (24 modules)                                    │
│                                                                             │
│  Checklist-driven repair manual for underperforming funnels:               │
│  Section 1: Landing Pages (checklist + 5 type breakdowns)                  │
│  Section 2: Checkouts (checklist + 3 type breakdowns)                      │
│  Section 3: Upsells — OLAF Method (checklist + 2 breakdowns)              │
│  Section 4: Facebook Ads (checklist + 4 type breakdowns)                   │
│  Section 5: Email Marketing (6 Power Emails + breakdowns)                  │
│                                                                             │
│  Real-world breakdowns: Blissy, Cacao Bliss, 1TAC, Paleovalley,           │
│  GS85, Sell Like Crazy                                                     │
│                                                                             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Tier 2: Tactical Frameworks

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                                                             │
│  SALES LETTER OUTLINE (Master Structure)                                    │
│  Source: RMBC Method                                                        │

│  4. Product Intro → 5. Benefits Expansion → 6. Close Sequence              │
│                                                                             │
│  10 LEAD STRUCTURES                                                         │
│  Source: RMBC Method (Module 6)                                             │
│  Story, Problem-Agitation, Curiosity, Contrarian, News, Proof,             │
│  Secret, Prediction, Invitation, Direct Offer                              │
│                                                                             │
│  SUBJECT LINE MATRIX (12 Categories)                                        │
│  Source: RMBC Method (Module 8)                                             │
│  Curiosity, Urgency, Benefit, Social Proof, Contrarian, Story,             │
│  News, Personal, Question, List, How-To, Warning — 60+ templates           │
│                                                                             │
│  AOV MONEY CLOSE (6-Step)                                                   │
│  Source: RMBC Method (Module 9)                                             │
│  Anchor → Stack → Contrast → Dissolve Risk → Urgency → Downsell           │
│                                                                             │
│  EMO STORY 16-STEP                                                          │
│  Source: Copy Accelerator                                                   │
│  16-step emotional storytelling framework for sales copy                   │
│                                                                             │
│  6 POWER EMAILS ★ NEW                                                       │
│  Source: Profit Fix Formula (Modules 19-24)                                │
│  Story, Proof, Objection-Killer, Urgency, Curiosity, Direct Offer          │
│                                                                             │
│  CLAUDE VSL PROJECTS ★ NEW                                                  │
│  Source: RMBC II (Module 9)                                                 │
│  End-to-end AI-powered VSL creation with specific Claude setups            │
│                                                                             │
│  UMP IDEATION PROTOCOL ★ NEW                                                │
│  Source: RMBC II (Module 6)                                                 │
│  50+ mechanism candidates via LLM → scoring → selection                    │
│                                                                             │
│  5 MASTER CHECKLISTS ★ NEW                                                  │
│  Source: Profit Fix Formula                                                │
│  Landing Pages, Checkouts, Upsells (OLAF), Facebook Ads, Emails           │
│                                                                             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Tier 3: Supporting Methodologies

| Framework | Domain | Source | Description |
|-----------|--------|--------|-------------|
| Mechanism Identification | copywriting | RMBC | Find and articulate the unique mechanism |
| Proof Stack Architecture | sales-letters | RMBC | Layer credentials, testimonials, data |
| Headline Testing Protocol | split-testing | RMBC | Systematic 10+ headline testing |
| Advertorial Bridge | cold-traffic | RMBC, RMBC-II, PFF | Native editorial for cold traffic |
| Compliant Copy Patterns | compliance | RMBC, PFF | High-converting within platform rules |
| Upsell Sequence Design | offer-engineering | RMBC, PFF | Post-purchase flow for max AOV |
| Research Document Template | copywriting | RMBC | Standardized research output |
| Brief Construction | copywriting | RMBC | Section-by-section outline |
| Product-Market Awareness Matrix | strategy | RMBC-II | Schwartz levels → copy type decision |
| VSL Structure Theory (2025) | VSL | RMBC-II | Updated VSL for modern attention spans |
| PDP Conversion Framework | e-commerce | RMBC-II, PFF | Product page optimization |
| Checkout Optimization Protocol | conversion | RMBC-II, PFF | Trust, micro-copy, flow |
| Ad-to-Page Congruence | ads | RMBC-II, PFF | Hook → page message match |
| OLAF Method (Justin Goff) | upsells | PFF | One-Line Acceptance Formula |
| Landing Page Type Matrix | conversion | PFF | 5 page types with specific checklists |
| Checkout Type Matrix | conversion | PFF | 3 checkout types with breakdowns |

## PHILOSOPHY

### Core Beliefs (L1 — Philosophies)

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                                                             │
│  ORIGINAL PRINCIPLES (RMBC / CA)                                            │
│  ════════════════════════════════                                           │
│                                                                             │
│  1. "Copywriting is engineering, not art."                                  │
│     → Process > inspiration. Systems > talent.                             │
│                                                                             │
│  2. "The mechanism is everything."                                          │
│     → Without a unique mechanism, copy is just words on a page.            │
│                                                                             │
│  3. "Research is 80% of the work."                                          │
│     → The copy writes itself when research is deep enough.                 │
│                                                                             │
│  4. "Speed comes from structure, not shortcuts."                            │
│     → RMBC makes him faster because the process eliminates waste.          │
│                                                                             │
│  5. "Split testing is the only honest feedback."                            │
│     → Opinions don't matter. Data does.                                    │
│                                                                             │
│  6. "The lead is 80% of the sale."                                          │
│     → If you lose them in the first 30 seconds, nothing else matters.      │
│                                                                             │
│  7. "Every word must earn its place."                                       │
│     → No filler, no fluff, no ego writing.                                 │
│                                                                             │
│  8. "Proof is the most underrated element."                                 │
│     → Stack proof until disbelief becomes impossible.                      │
│                                                                             │
│  EVOLVED PRINCIPLES (RMBC II / PFF) ★ NEW                                  │
│  ════════════════════════════════════════                                   │
│                                                                             │
│  9. "AI is the first draft machine. You are the editor-in-chief."          │
│     → Humans direct, AI executes, humans refine.                           │
│                                                                             │
│ 10. "Fix the weakest factor and you fix the whole funnel."                  │
│     → Bottleneck theory applied to conversion optimization.                │
│                                                                             │
│ 11. "Think in funnels, not pages."                                          │
│     → Every element is connected. Optimize the system.                     │
│                                                                             │
│ 12. "Diagnose before you fix."                                              │
│     → Checklists before creativity. Analysis before writing.               │
│                                                                             │
│ 13. "Answer the 23 questions and the copy writes itself."                   │
│     → Brief 2.0 — the evolved pre-writing diagnostic.                     │
│                                                                             │
│ 14. "6 emails, done right, can replace a 30-email autoresponder."           │
│     → Power Emails > volume. Quality > quantity.                           │
│                                                                             │
│                                                                             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Mental Models (L2)

| Model | Application | Source |
|-------|-------------|--------|
| Copy as Engineering | Apply repeatable processes to creative output | RMBC |
| Mechanism-First Thinking | Always start with WHY the product works | RMBC |
| Research Depth = Copy Quality | Direct correlation between research time and conversion | RMBC |
| Lead Dominance | Disproportionate effort on first 10% of copy | RMBC |
| Data Over Opinion | Only split test results determine what's "good" | RMBC, CA |
| Proof Stacking | Multiple proof types compound persuasion exponentially | RMBC |
| Outline Before Draft | Never write copy without a complete brief | RMBC |
| Speed Through Structure | Frameworks enable faster output | RMBC |
| Funnel Systems Thinking ★ | Think in connected systems, not isolated pages | RMBC-II |
| AI Collaboration Model ★ | AI drafts, human directs and refines | RMBC-II |
| Bottleneck-First Optimization ★ | Fix the weakest link to unlock the whole chain | RMBC-II, PFF |
| Checklist Diagnostic ★ | Systematic audit before creative intervention | PFF |
| Type-Specific Optimization ★ | Different page/ad types need different approaches | PFF |
| 15-Factor Diagnostic ★ | Quantitative scoring for qualitative output | RMBC-II |

### Heuristics (L3)

| Heuristic | Threshold | Domain | Source |
|-----------|-----------|--------|--------|
| Research-to-writing ratio | 3:1 minimum | copywriting | RMBC |
| Headlines to test | 10+ per sales piece | split-testing | RMBC |
| Lead length | 500-800 words before mechanism reveal | sales-letters | RMBC |
| Subject line length | 4-7 words optimal (cold traffic) | email-marketing | RMBC |
| Proof elements per page | 3+ (testimonial + data + credential) | sales-letters | RMBC |
| VSL retention hook | Every 2-3 minutes | VSLs | RMBC |
| Upsell conversion target | 25-40% of front-end buyers | offer-engineering | RMBC |
| Mechanism reveal timing | After full problem agitation | copywriting | RMBC |
| 23 questions before writing ★ | Zero tolerance for incomplete brief | copywriting | RMBC-II |
| Funnel Factor minimum score ★ | 80+ required (below = fix urgently) | funnel-architecture | RMBC-II |
| Mechanism candidates ★ | 50+ via LLM before selection | mechanism-identification | RMBC-II |
| Ad-to-page message match ★ | >90% congruence required | ads | RMBC-II |
| Power Email set ★ | 6 types minimum in every sequence | email-marketing | PFF |
| Checkout trust elements ★ | 5+ trust signals visible | checkout-optimization | PFF |
| Landing page type match ★ | Match page type to traffic source | conversion-optimization | PFF |
